positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial fauna composition featuring a majestic lunar moth intertwined with stylized constellations and glowing nebulae. The moth's wings should exhibit intricate, geometric linework reminiscent of Art Nouveau engraving, contrasting against deep sapphire blues, cosmic purples, and shimmering gold accents. The composition must be centered and perfectly balanced, designed as a repeating pattern element. Use a style combining fine art engraving, negative space illustration, and bioluminescent watercolor washes. The overall aesthetic must be clean, high-contrast, and visually meditative, optimized for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, noisy, smudged, text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, multiple subjects, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealism, gradients, cartoon, childish
